results.caption: A woman in a striped shirt sits behind a table of fresh fish at a market. The image contains watermarks and text.
A woman in a conical hat carries a basket of fish on the street. The image contains watermarks and text: Made in OUTLET FACTORY, alamy, Image ID: P6TXMG, www.alamy.com.
The image shows raw chicken fillets in baskets with repeating "VNP" watermarks at the bottom.
The image shows a busy open-air meat market with vendors and customers, featuring a watermark from Alamy.
